授業目的: Students are provided with an opportunity to learn the communications skills necessary for success in college (overseas) and beyond.  Focus will be on developing original academic arguments in English, using appropriate evidence to support these arguments.
到達目標: By the end of the semester, students will be able to improve their writing skills as well as critical reading, critical thinking, research and presentation skills.
授業方法: Lectures, presentations, discussions and team contributions

第1回:
【Startup Week】Online class（On-demand format）《90minutes》
Overview of course

Visit the course website on LUNA to access the lecture materials for a Startup period.
第2回:
【Core Week①】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
The qualities of good writing
第3回:
【Core Week②】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Critical writing: discuss scientific article (Part 1)
第4回:
【Core Week③】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Critical writing: discuss scientific article (Part 2)
第9回:
【Core Week⑧】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Critical writing: discuss scientific article (Part 3)
第10回:
【Core Week⑨】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Critical writing: discuss scientific article (Part 4)
第11回:
【Core Week⑩】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
The writing process: what does it mean to revise?
第12回:
【Core Week⑪】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Using sources of information/illustrations in scientific and academic writing
第14回:
【After Classes and examinations】Face-to-face class《90minutes》
Final presentation (Part 2)
第15回:
【Flex Hours】 Online class（On-demand format）《90minutes》
The link to the lecture will be announced later.
トピック.授業外学習2: The completion of writing assignments and reading assignments is essential to pass this class.  Preparation for in-class discussion and an oral presentation is required.

参考書/Reference books1: On Writing Well (30 Anv Rep edition)
参考書/Reference books2: How to Write a Lot: A Practical Guide to Productive Academic Writing
参考書/Reference books3: Strunk, William Jr. and White, E.B.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
備考Note0: The course schedule and content is subject to change.

name: 【500】International Professional Communication A／International Professional Communication A
